Target Section: Quick start: preview one result, then use it
Primary Evidence: Current note -> related result -> preview -> chosen link/sentence
Reject If: Starts from search, graph, settings, Lookup, Pro label, or result list without note improvement

Primary Evidence: Current note, Connections results, preview, and use target visible together
Reject If: Scores or controls become the main proof

Primary Evidence: Expanded result/preview while active note remains visible
Reject If: Preview is only a hover trick or requires leaving the note

Target Section: Drag one useful result into your note
Primary Evidence: Chosen result becomes a visible Obsidian link in ## Related
Reject If: Inserted text/link is mocked or appears without visible user choice

Target Section: Hold one anchor steady with Pause
Primary Evidence: Pause holds the original current-note anchor while browsing a result
Reject If: Pause appears before first-value workflow or labels are stale

Target Section: When results feel stale or stuck
Primary Evidence: Play/Pause or exact current equivalent, Refresh, and active-note title visible
Reject If: Looks like an advanced controls tutorial

Target Section: Quick start: finish, review, add one link
Primary Evidence: End of note -> footer appears -> one result previewed -> one link added
Reject If: Footer looks like a sidebar/list destination or shows Pro-only label

Primary Evidence: Bottom of note, footer header, top results, and link insertion area
Reject If: Screenshot does not prove footer is attached to the note end

Target Section: Especially useful on mobile and no-sidebar workflows
Reject If: Claims mobile behavior not verified in current UI

Target Section: If the footer does not help
Primary Evidence: Footer enabled/toggled and footer visible at note bottom
Reject If: Full settings page or Pro-only control dominates

Primary Evidence: Finish note -> review related results -> add one useful relationship -> move on
Reject If: Workflow becomes a bulk cleanup or auto-linking claim

Primary Evidence: One selected useful result and one deliberately ignored adjacent result
Reject If: Weak result is framed as product failure or the selected link is not visible
